description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly red and pinkish skin, featuring subtle yellow-green undertones near the stem. The surface is smooth with a natural sheen and scattered small white lenticels. One side of the apple has a large, irregular bite taken out, exposing the pale, moist, and fibrous interior flesh. The apple's shape is slightly asymmetrical, with a gentle bulge and a visible stem cavity. The overall appearance suggests freshness, with the bitten area showing a clean break and no signs of browning.
description: A red apple with a large bite taken out, revealing pale flesh and a smooth, shiny skin.
description_view_0: Red apple with visible stem cavity and smooth, rounded surface.
description_view_1: Apple's top and stem area visible, showing pink-red skin and subtle yellow-green near the stem.
description_view_2: Large bite taken out, exposing pale, moist interior flesh.
description_view_3: Back side of apple with irregular bite mark and exposed flesh.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, no bruises
